name: 殷紫萍
bio: 殷紫萍，以治愈之力守护同伴的医者。她的生存能力极强，以香疗之术为盾，以治愈之力延续战斗。
bio_en: Ziping Yin, a healer who protects allies with healing power. She has excellent survivability, using aromatherapy as a shield and healing power to sustain the battle.
story: 殷紫萍，以治愈之力守护同伴的医者。她以香疗之术为盾，以救恩之力为援，在战场上扮演着不可或缺的守护角色。她的存在让同伴们能够更加无畏地战斗。

skills.skill_description: 释放木质能量，种植灵枝持续10秒。触碰灵枝的友军可恢复生命值和护甲，并获得伤害减免提升。冷却22秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Cast out Ligneous Energy to plant Spiritual Twigs that last 10s. Allies who touch them regenerate health and armor and gain increased damage reduction. Cooldown: 22s.

skills.skill_description: 释放木质能量，以灵感护盾守护殷紫萍及所有友军持续8秒。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Cast out Ligneous Energy, guarding Ziping and all allies with an Inspiration Shield for 8s. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 在怒气达到100%时获得镇魂，若怒气达到70%则可释放，提升恢复效果20%并恢复生命值。
skills.skill_description_en: Gain a Sedate Soul at 100% rage, but if at 70% rage, cast it out to increase recovery effect by 20% and regenerate HP.

skills.skill_description: 以70%怒气召唤终极技能，恢复护甲和生命值。此时镇魂可在不消耗怒气的情况下释放。
skills.skill_description_en: Summon the ultimate using 70% rage to regenerate armor and HP. Sedate Soul can be cast without using any Rage.
